The carmaker has signed a memorandum of understanding with TYTAN Technologies, a Munich counter-drone startup, to develop vehicle-based systems that detect and shoot down hostile drones, built on its G-Class SUV and Sprinter van. Mercedes calls the defence sector “a strategic growth field”. The deal, signed at the ILA […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> ShopAgentic raises €1.9M to build commerce infrastructure for AI shopping agents https://thenextweb.com/news/shopagentic-1-9m-pre-seed-agentic-commerce Thu, 11 Jun 2026 10:05:41 +0000 TheNextWeb=7bdf2ad917c906688299bcad0929cfc4 A German startup wants to rebuild online commerce for shoppers who are not human. ShopAgentic has raised a €1.9mn pre-seed to do it. May Ventures and Greenfield Capital co-led the oversubscribed round. What ShopAgentic is building ShopAgentic calls itself a “native agentic commerce system”. It runs a squad of specialised AI agents, each owning one […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Mississippi residents file a 10,000-strong class action against Musk’s xAI and SpaceX over data-centre noise https://thenextweb.com/news/xai-spacex-mississippi-data-centre-noise-lawsuit Thu, 11 Jun 2026 09:53:09 +0000 TheNextWeb=cee4a4b86f1e86e5c36705776c36892e The backlash against AI data centres has reached a new stage: a class-action lawsuit. Residents of Mississippi have sued Elon Musk’s xAI and SpaceX, claiming a gas-fired power plant that feeds nearby data centres blasts “omnipresent and inescapable” noise that has eroded their health and home values. The ruling, handed down today by the Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC), dwarfs the previous record of 134.8 billion won imposed on telecoms firm SK Telecom last year. The […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> OpenAI and Anthropic keep warning about AI risks, then releasing bigger models and filing for IPOs https://thenextweb.com/news/openai-anthropic-ai-risk-warnings-ipo-irony Thu, 11 Jun 2026 09:26:31 +0000 TheNextWeb=5bc61bcce32e3cc38d69829206b17032 In the past fortnight, the two most powerful AI labs on the planet have published research papers, blog posts, and policy proposals warning that frontier artificial intelligence is advancing faster than anyone can control it. The round would fuel the fintech’s expansion beyond payments into stock and ETF trading, savings, investments, and pensions.
